Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Set For Trial On Jan-09-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. PAUL PERDUE, ESQ., Tel No. 415-291-0474 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS PAM AHLIN AND SANTI ROGERS'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled in its entirety. Defendants' request for judicial notice is granted as to exhibits A and D as to both the existence and contents of those documents and as to exhibits B and C as to the existence but not the truth of the contents of those documents. The first amended complaint and the matters that are subject to judicial notice do not show that all of the amounts claimed by DSH are necessarily time-barred. Specifically, the first amended complaint and exhibits A and D to defendants' request for judicial notice do not show that services were rendered to the decedent within four years of the filing of this action such or that plaintiff acknowledged the amounts claimed by DSH. Nor does Probate Code 1461, by its terms or as construed by any case, require that plaintiff allege compliance with that section. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
